title: Mr D Roberts-Griffiths and Others v CP Pharmaceuticals Ltd and Wockhardt UK Ltd: 1603339/2023 and 1600305/2024
text:
Claim Nos 1603339/2023  
1600305/2024 
 
 1 
 
 
EMPLOYMENT TRIBUNALS 
 
 
Claimant:   Mr D Roberts-Griffiths and Others  
 
Respondent:   CP Pharmaceuticals Limited (First Respondent) 
  Wockhardt UK Limited (Second Respondent) 
 
Heard at:    Cardiff (CVP)     On:  6 June 2024 
 
Before:    Employment Judge R Evans 
 
Representation 
For the Claimants:   Mr G Pollitt (Counsel) 
For the First Respondent: Mrs D Champion (Solicitor) 
For the Second Respondent: Mrs D Champion (Solicitor) 
 
 
JUDGMENT 
 
 
1.  The Claimant, Mr D Roberts-Griffiths, is granted permission to withdraw claim 
1603339/2023 on the basis that it is duplicated in claim 1600305/2024. 
 
2. The Claimants in claim 1600305/2024 are granted permission to withdraw their claim 
against the Second Respondent (meaning that no claim exists against the Second 
Respondent). 
 
 
 
 
 
Signed by Employment Judge R Evans 
Date - 6 June 2024 
 
 
      JUDGMENT SENT TO THE PARTIES ON 11 June 2024 
       
     FOR THE TRIBUNAL OFFICE Mr N Roche 
Claim Nos 1603339/2023  
1600305/2024 
Notes 
Reasons for the judgment having been given orally at the hearing, written reasons will not be 
provided unless a request was made by either party at the hearing or a written request is 
presented by either party within 14 days of the sending of this written record of the decision. 
Public access to employment tribunal decisions 
Judgments and reasons for the judgments are published, in full, online at 
www.gov.uk/employment-tribunal-decisions shortly after a copy has been sent to the 
claimant(s) and respondent(s) in a case. 
2
